'''nazïfdïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrinogen|fibrinogen]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrinogen|fibrinogen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| nazïfdïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || næzïfdïfth || næzïfdïfj || næzïfdïfsh || næzïfdïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || nazïfzïfdïfth || nazïfzïfdïfj || nazïfzïfdïfsh || nazïfzïfdïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || nazïfdïfth || nazïfdïfj || nazïfdïfsh || nazïfdïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || nazïffdïffth || nazïffdïffj || nazïffdïffsh || nazïffdïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || nazïfdïfïf || nazïfdïfïf || nazïfdïfïf || nazïfdïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || nazïfdïfth || nazïfdïfj || nazïfdïfsh || nazïfdïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || nazïfdïfïfl || nazïfdïfïfl || nazïfdïfïfl || nazïfdïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || nazïfdïfïfïf || nazïfdïfïfïf || nazïfdïfïfïf || nazïfdïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || nazïfdïfïfn || nazïfdïfïfn || nazïfdïfïfn || nazïfdïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || nazïfdïfïforo || nazïfdïfïforo || nazïfdïfïforo || nazïfdïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
